name: Mailgun
description: Monitor Mailgun email infrastructure including account user access, API availability, and sending domain configuration and verification status

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Mailgun Dashboard (https://app.mailgun.com).
2. Go to Account Settings (top-right) > API Keys.
3. Click the eye icon next to 'Private API key' to reveal it.
4. Copy the key (starts with 'key-').
5. Select your region (US or EU) based on where your sending domains are hosted.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Your primary account API key. Found in Mailgun Dashboard > Account Settings > API Keys (Private API key).

credentialFields.label: Region
credentialFields.helpText: The region where your Mailgun domains are hosted.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all users on the Mailgun account with their roles, activation status, and 2FA settings to verify access control.

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Mailgun API access by listing sending domains. A successful response confirms the API key is valid and the account is accessible.

checks.name: Domain Configuration
checks.description: Lists all sending domains and their verification status. Domains in 'unverified' or 'disabled' state are flagged as findings requiring attention.
